calendarFaqs.q: When does school start for Wake County Public School System in 2027-2028?
calendarFaqs.a: The first day of school for Wake County Public School System (WCPSS) is Monday, August 23, 2027. Teacher workdays run August 16–20 the week before students arrive.

calendarFaqs.q: When is the last day of school for Wake County Public School System in 2027-2028?
calendarFaqs.a: The last day of school for Wake County Public School System is Thursday, June 8, 2028. The school year runs from August through June, covering 185 instructional days.

calendarFaqs.q: When is spring break 2027-2028 for Wake County Public School System?
calendarFaqs.a: Spring break for Wake County Public School System runs March 27–31, 2028 — a 5-day break. Good Friday (April 14) falls two weeks after spring break ends, unlike 2026–2027 where Good Friday led directly into spring break.

calendarFaqs.q: When is winter break 2027-2028 for Wake County Public School System?
calendarFaqs.a: Winter break for Wake County Public School System runs December 20, 2027–January 3, 2028 (15 days) — three days longer than the 12-day winter break in 2026–2027. School resumes Tuesday, January 4, 2028.

calendarFaqs.q: When is Thanksgiving break 2027-2028 for Wake County Public School System?
calendarFaqs.a: Thanksgiving break for Wake County Public School System runs November 24–26, 2027 (Wednesday through Friday). Thanksgiving Day falls on November 25. School resumes Monday, November 29, 2027.

yearNumbers.label: Good Friday
yearNumbers.detail: Good Friday falls after Spring Break ends (Mar 27–31) this year — a 2-week gap between the break and the holiday, unlike 2026–2027 where Good Friday led directly into Spring Break.

yearNumbers.label: Longer Winter Break
yearNumbers.detail: Winter Break runs Dec 20–Jan 3 (15 days), one day longer than 2026–2027 (Dec 21–Jan 1, 11 days).

calendarNotes: Wake County Public School System begins the 2027–2028 school year on August 23, 2027, following a teacher workday week August 16–20. Thanksgiving break runs November 24–26. Winter break runs December 20, 2027 through January 3, 2028; school reopens January 4. Spring Break runs March 27–31, 2028, followed by a teacher workday on April 3. Good Friday (April 14) is a school holiday. The school year ends June 8, 2028.
